author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-cluster audit complete. 17 of 19 sklearn cluster+mixture+semi_supervised estimators present; missing only SpectralBiclustering, SpectralCoclustering (existing #76/#77/#78), and SelfTrainingClassifier (new #283).

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #277 fit_predict on all 13 unsupervised clustering estimators (predict-capable variants delegate to predict; label-only variants return labels().clone())
- #278 predict_proba + score + score_samples on FittedGaussianMixture and FittedBayesianGaussianMixture (BGMM gets a new unnormalized_log_prob helper)
- #279 GMM bic/aic signatures changed from (n_samples) to sklearn-faithful (X), and the same two methods added to BayesianGMM
- #280 Transform impl added to FittedBisectingKMeans (KMeans + MiniBatchKMeans already had it)
- #281 predict_proba + score on FittedLabelPropagation and FittedLabelSpreading (nearest-training-point label distribution; mean accuracy with -1 sentinel skipped)
- #282 proof-of-API integration test (16 tests across every estimator)

Filed during audit (deferred):
- #283 SelfTrainingClassifier semi-supervised meta-estimator

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #3 oracle test failures: OPTICS, Birch (algorithmic bug fixes — separate effort)
- #76, #77, #78 SpectralBiclustering / SpectralCoclustering
- #79 estimate_bandwidth + get_bin_seeds helpers
- #80 cluster_optics_dbscan + cluster_optics_xi post-processing fns

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- BayesianGaussianMixture exposes its own bic/aic (sklearn does not)
- LabelPropagation/LabelSpreading score skips the -1 sentinel rather than counting it as a miss

Verification: 348 tests pass (299 unit + 16 api_proof + 9 oracle + 5 proptest + 3 sklearn_equiv + 16 doctest). Zero regressions.
